command: echo '=== Terminal log (last 20) ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && tail -20 "$TLOG" 2>&1 | tr -d '\0' && echo '=== EA log ===' && EALOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo "File: $EALOG" && tail -30 "$EALOG" 2>&1 | tr -d '\0'
